tasks.prompt: A cute Pikachu-style Pokémon character representing Faith. The creature stands confidently on a rock with a glowing cross-shaped light behind it, golden-white coloring, determined hopeful expression with big sparkly eyes. Chibi proportions, soft divine light rays, kawaii Japanese art style, circular composition, white background. No text.

A cute Pikachu-style Pokémon character representing Hope. The creature looks up at a rainbow and a bright star, soft sky-blue and gold coloring, joyful expectant expression with big sparkly eyes. Chibi proportions, gentle clouds around, kawaii Japanese art style, circular composition, white background. No text.
